title: Intelligent Generation and Security Protection for IP Digital Assets: Key Technologies and Teaching-Oriented Practice
authors: Lixi Dai, Di Wu
publish: Proceedings of the 2026 2nd International Conference on Digital Education and Information Technology
abstract: None
title_zh: IP数字资产的智能生成与安全保护：关键技术与教学实践
abstract_zh: None

title: Vibe Coding on Trial: Operating Characteristics of Unanimous LLM Juries
authors: Muhammad Aziz Ullah, Abdul Serwadda
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are now good enough at coding that developers can describe intent in plain language and let the tool produce the first code draft, a workflow increasingly built into tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Replit. What is missing is a reliable way to tell which model written queries are safe to accept without sending everything to a human. We study the application of an LLM jury to run this review step. We first benchmark 15 open models on 82 MySQL text to SQL tasks using an execution grounded protocol to get a clean baseline of which models are strong. From the six best models we build unanimous committees of sizes 1 through 6 that see the prompt, schema, and candidate SQL and accept it only when every member says it is correct. This rule matches safety first deployments where false accepts are more costly than false rejects. We measure true positive rate, false positive rate and Youden J and we also look at committees per generator. Our results show that single model judges are uneven, that small unanimous committees of strong models can cut false accepts while still passing many good queries, and that the exact committee composition matters significantly.
title_zh: Vibe Coding 试炼：一致的大型语言模型陪审团的操作特性
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）如今在编程方面已足够成熟，开发者只需用自然语言描述意图，即可让工具自动生成代码初稿，这一工作流程正越来越多地被集成到 GitHub Copilot、Cursor 和 Replit 等开发工具中。然而，目前仍缺乏一种可靠的方法，能够判断由模型生成的查询是否安全，从而无需将所有内容都提交给人类审核。本文研究了使用 LLM 评审团（jury）来执行这一审查步骤的可行性。我们首先通过一个基于执行结果验证的协议，在 82 个 MySQL 文本转 SQL 任务上对 15 个开源模型进行了基准测试，以获得各模型实际能力的清晰基准。从表现最佳的六款模型中，我们构建了规模为 1 到 6 的一致委员会（unanimous committees），这些委员会会同时看到提示（prompt）、数据模式（schema）和候选 SQL 查询，并仅当所有成员均判定其正确时才接受该查询。这种“全票通过”的规则符合“安全优先”的部署原则——即错误接受的代价远高于错误拒绝。我们评估了真阳性率（true positive rate）、假阳性率（false positive rate）以及 Youden J 指数，并进一步分析了不同生成器对应的委员会表现。研究结果表明：单一模型作为评判者存在不一致性；由强模型组成的小型一致委员会能够在显著降低错误接受率的同时，仍能通过大量优质查询；且委员会的具体构成对最终效果具有显著影响。

title: Looking into Black Box Code Language Models
authors: Muhammad Umair Haider, Umar Farooq, A. B. Siddique, Mark Marron
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Language Models (LMs) have shown applications for code-related tasks, leading to numerous code LMs being proposed recently. However, most works focus solely on benchmark performance, treating LMs as black boxes. A handful of studies explore attention mechanisms in code LMs, yet feed-forward layers — which contain two-thirds of parameters — remain underexplored. In this work, we investigate feed-forward layers in two state-of-the-art code LMs, Codegen-Mono and Polycoder, across three programming languages: Java, Go, and Python. We examine concept organization, editability, and layer-wise behavior under varying input contexts. Our findings reveal that lower layers capture syntactic patterns, while higher layers encode abstract semantics. We further show that targeted concept edits within feedforward layers preserve model performance. These results provide insights toward interpretability, debugging, and controllability of code LMs.
title_zh: 深入探究黑箱代码语言模型
abstract_zh: 语言模型（LMs）在代码相关任务中展现出广泛应用，近年来涌现出大量针对代码的语言模型。然而，大多数研究仅关注基准性能，将语言模型视为“黑箱”。尽管有少数研究探讨了代码语言模型中的注意力机制，但包含三分之二参数的前馈层仍鲜受关注。本文我们深入研究了两种先进的代码语言模型——Codegen-Mono和Polycoder——在三种编程语言（Java、Go和Python）下的前馈层特性，考察其概念组织方式、可编辑性以及在不同输入上下文下的分层行为。研究发现，低层主要捕捉语法模式，而高层则编码抽象语义。此外，我们还证明了在前馈层中进行针对性的概念修改能够保持模型性能。这些结果为提升代码语言模型的可解释性、调试能力及可控性提供了重要洞见。

title: Rearchitecting Programmable Networks For In-Network Computing: From Hardware To Language
authors: Haifeng Sun, Bing Liu, Taixu Tian, Jinbo Sun, Jintao He, Qun Huang, Luyou He, Xuan Wang, Feng Gao, Liguo Wang, Xiangcan Xu, Junyi Guo, Xiaoping Zhu, Yongqiang Yang
publish: Proceedings of the 21st European Conference on Computer Systems
abstract: None
title_zh: 为网络内计算重构可编程网络：从硬件到语言
abstract_zh: None

title: Software-Hardware Co-Design of a Distributed Energy Access System Based on a Unified Sensing-Computing-Communication Chip
authors: Xiaolong Lyu, Qin Ma, Jie Du
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Electrical and Electronic Engineering (AI3E)
abstract: Confronting the challenges of poor compatibility, complex communication protocols, and insufficient operational reliability in existing distributed energy resource (DER) integration systems, this paper proposes a hardware-software codesign method based on an integrated sensing-computingcommunication chip. Centered around this chip, the method establishes a modular hardware platform for multi-source energy integration. At the software level, a lightweight embedded operating system is designed, which, alongside unified driver interfaces and a multi-core task scheduling strategy, enables synergistic hardware-software optimization. Furthermore, this paper introduces a protocol adaptation mechanism and a firmware self-recovery mechanism to address communication protocol switching and system fault restoration in complex environments. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed system achieves improvements in energy efficiency utilization, task response time, and operational stability compared to conventional solutions.
title_zh: 基于统一感知-计算-通信芯片的分布式能源接入系统软硬件协同设计
abstract_zh: 针对现有分布式能源资源（DER）集成系统中存在的兼容性差、通信协议复杂以及运行可靠性不足等挑战，本文提出了一种基于集成传感-计算-通信芯片的软硬件协同设计方法。以该芯片为核心，构建了面向多源能源融合的模块化硬件平台。在软件层面，设计了一款轻量级嵌入式操作系统，结合统一的驱动接口与多核任务调度策略，实现了软硬件的协同优化。此外，本文还引入了协议适配机制和固件自恢复机制，有效解决了复杂环境下通信协议切换及系统故障恢复的问题。实验结果表明，与传统方案相比，所提出的系统在能源利用效率、任务响应时间以及运行稳定性方面均取得了显著提升。

title: Bridging Classic and Modern AI for Analyzing Disagreement Between Lexical and Neural Code Retrieval
authors: Vishwa Bhatt, Jerry Cervantes-Fernandez, Zhixin Yu, Bryan Vera, Yunfei Hou, Jennifer Kim Jin
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Aligning natural-language documentation with source code remains a core challenge in semantic code search, particularly when documentation varies in abstraction and lexical grounding. This work evaluates lexical, neural, and hybrid retrieval approaches under a global code search setting using the Java subset of the CodeSearchNet benchmark. A symbolic BM25 baseline is compared with a neural semantic encoder and two integration strategies: hybrid reranking and disagreement-aware routing. Neural retrieval consistently outperforms lexical retrieval, improving mean reciprocal rank from 0.271 to 0.318, while hybrid reranking further increases performance $(M R R=0.341)$. A disagreement-aware routing strategy achieves the best results (MRR $=0.345$), demonstrating that principled integration of symbolic and neural representations improves robustness. Analysis further shows that lexical–semantic rank disagreement systematically correlates with semantic abstraction, indicating that such disagreement reflects meaningful alignment differences rather than retrieval noise.
title_zh: 融合经典与现代人工智能以分析词汇与神经网络代码检索之间的分歧
abstract_zh: 将自然语言文档与源代码对齐仍是语义代码搜索中的核心挑战，尤其是在文档的抽象层次和词汇基础存在差异的情况下。本文在CodeSearchNet基准数据集的Java子集上，于全局代码搜索场景下评估了词汇、神经网络及混合检索方法。研究对比了基于符号的BM25基线模型、神经语义编码器以及两种集成策略：混合重排序和基于分歧感知的路由策略。实验结果表明，神经检索方法始终优于词汇检索方法，将平均倒数排名（MRR）从0.271提升至0.318；而混合重排序进一步提升了性能（MRR=0.341）。基于分歧感知的路由策略取得了最佳效果（MRR=0.345），证明了有原则地融合符号化与神经表示能够增强系统的鲁棒性。进一步分析显示，词汇与语义排名之间的分歧程度与语义抽象程度系统相关，表明这种分歧反映了有意义的对齐差异，而非单纯的检索噪声。

title: LLM-based Zero-shot Triple Extraction for Automated Ontology Generation from Software Engineering Standards
authors: Songhui Yue
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Ontologies have supported knowledge representation and white-box reasoning for decades; thus, the automated ontology generation (AOG) plays a crucial role in scaling their use. Software engineering standards (SES) consist of long, unstructured text (with high noise) and paragraphs with domain-specific terms. In this setting, relation triple extraction (RTE), together with term extraction, constitutes the first stage toward AOG. This work proposes an open-source large language model (LLM)-assisted approach to RTE for SES. Instead of solely relying on prompt-engineering-based methods, this study promotes the use of LLMs as an aid in constructing ontologies and explores an effective AOG workflow that includes document segmentation, candidate term mining, LLM-based relation inference, term normalization, and cross-section alignment. Expert-annotated reference sets at three granularities are constructed and used to evaluate the ontology generated from the study. The results show that it is comparable and potentially superior to the OpenIE method of triple extraction.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的零样本三元组抽取用于从软件工程标准自动生成本体
abstract_zh: 本体长期以来一直支持知识表示与可解释的白盒推理，因此自动化本体生成（AOG）在扩展其应用方面发挥着至关重要的作用。软件工程标准（SES）包含大量未结构化的文本（噪声高），以及带有领域特定术语的段落。在此背景下，关系三元组抽取（RTE）与术语抽取共同构成了迈向AOG的第一阶段。本文提出了一种开源大语言模型（LLM）辅助的SES关系三元组抽取方法。不同于仅依赖提示工程的方法，本研究倡导将LLM作为构建本体的辅助工具，并探索了一种高效的AOG工作流程，包括文档分段、候选术语挖掘、基于LLM的关系推断、术语规范化以及跨章节对齐。研究构建了三个粒度级别的专家标注参考集，并用于评估所生成本体的质量。实验结果表明，该方法在三元组抽取方面表现与OpenIE相当，甚至可能更优。

title: From Formal Learning to Professional Practice: Automated LLM-based Coding and Visualisation of Team Dialogue in in-situ Healthcare Simulation
authors: Sachini Samaraweera, Linxuan Zhao, Vanessa Echeverria, Riordan Alfredo, Guanliang Chen, Joy Davis, Sheravika Leonny, Samantha Sevenhuysen, Clifford Connell, Dragan Gasevic, Roberto Martinez-Maldonado, Anuja Dharmaratne
publish: Proceedings of the LAK26: 16th International Learning Analytics and Knowledge Conference
abstract: None
title_zh: 从正式学习到专业实践：基于自动化大语言模型的团队对话编码与可视化在医疗现场模拟中的应用
abstract_zh: None

title: Constraint-Consistent Skill Composition for Reliable Zero-Shot Task Generalization in LLM Agents
authors: Ru Meng, Shaoyu Huang, Xinyue Zhang, Yourong Yang, Kewei Zeng, Zhibin Huang
publish: 2026 9th International Symposium on Big Data and Applied Statistics (ISBDAS)
abstract: Addressing the frequent emergence of new tasks and long-tail demands in open environments for large language model agents, this paper proposes a task transfer and zero-shot generalization method for composable skill libraries. This transforms the agent’s capability organization from an end-to-end strategy into a problem of structured construction and combinatorial scheduling of reusable skill units. First, skills are uniformly encapsulated in a structured manner, explicitly describing interface parameter patterns, preconditions, posteffects, and semantic representations, enabling skills to possess searchable and verifiable invocation semantics across different tasks and execution contexts. Second, a shared semantic space for tasks and skills is constructed. Candidate skill retrieval and selection are achieved through joint scoring of semantic relevance and constraint consistency, reducing misselection and combinatorial instability caused by relying solely on text similarity. Third, task solving is modeled as a joint optimization process of skill sequence planning and state evolution. Precondition satisfiability constraints and state transition consistency checks are introduced during the planning process to improve the executability and controllability of the generated sequences. Finally, cross-task shared priors are introduced to constrain policy distribution deviations, enhancing stable transfer capabilities under changes in task descriptions and environmental differences. Comparative experiments based on public datasets verify the comprehensive advantages of the proposed method in terms of task success rate, tool invocation accuracy, constraint satisfaction, and average steps, demonstrating that the structured skill library and constraint consistency mechanism can effectively support zero-shot task adaptation and reliable execution of agents.
title_zh: 约束一致的技能组合以实现大型语言模型代理在零样本任务泛化中的可靠性
abstract_zh: 针对大型语言模型智能体在开放环境中频繁出现的新任务与长尾需求问题，本文提出了一种可组合技能库的任务迁移与零样本泛化方法。该方法将智能体能力的组织方式从端到端的策略模式，转变为可复用技能单元的结构化构建与组合调度问题。首先，技能以统一的结构化方式封装，明确描述接口参数模式、前置条件、后置效果及语义表示，使技能具备跨任务和执行上下文的可搜索性与可验证性调用语义。其次，构建了任务与技能共享的语义空间，通过语义相关性与约束一致性联合评分实现候选技能的检索与选择，有效降低仅依赖文本相似度导致的误选与组合不稳定性。第三，将任务求解建模为技能序列规划与状态演化的联合优化过程，在规划阶段引入前置条件满足性约束与状态转移一致性检查，显著提升生成序列的可执行性与可控性。最后，引入跨任务共享先验以约束策略分布的偏差，在任务描述变化与环境差异下增强智能体的稳定迁移能力。基于公开数据集的对比实验验证了所提方法在任务成功率、工具调用准确率、约束满足率以及平均步数等方面的综合优势，表明结构化技能库与约束一致性机制能够有效支持零样本任务适应与智能体的可靠执行。

title: No More Translation at Runtime: LLM-Empowered Static Binary Translation
authors: Zhibo Liu, Huaijin Wang, Wai Kin Wong, Daoyuan Wu, Shuai Wang

title_zh: 运行时不再进行翻译：基于大语言模型的静态二进制翻译

title: A System Development Code Auto-Completion Method Based on Deep Reinforcement Learning
authors: Ping Zhou, Jianfei Xiao, Xiaolong Zhang, Haowen Tian, Junlong Kang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Electrical and Electronic Engineering (AI3E)
abstract: In the field of software development, only simple encrypted system development code data can be used, resulting in low accuracy of completed code. To address this issue, a system development code auto completion method based on deep reinforcement learning is proposed. Firstly, in terms of developing code data for encryption systems, design a dynamic key negotiation scheme based on elliptic curve cryptography and a hierarchical cache scheduling mechanism, using a dual authentication mechanism to ensure data security. Then, a completion model is constructed, using a dual channel feature encoder to extract encrypted code features. The dynamic context encoding layer models historical dependencies, and the reinforcement learning decision layer optimizes the completion strategy using the PPO algorithm and designs a reward function. Finally, a completion framework based on triplet contrastive learning and multi granularity feature fusion is proposed, which constructs triplet data with functional modules as anchor points, calculates matching probabilities and dynamic weight vectors, and integrates multi-dimensional information to achieve automatic completion. The experimental results show that in terms of data processing, the design method automatically generates data with a highly consistent trend with the actual code written after 30 seconds. From the perspective of accuracy and time consumption, the design method takes 200 ms to achieve 90% accuracy, and only 100 ms to 150 ms to increase from 70% to 85% accuracy. Compared with literature, the design method has flexible scalability, platform independence, and fully automated integration. The code generation efficiency reaches $\mathbf{2 5}$ lines per second, far exceeding other literature methods, and can accurately and efficiently complete the system development code.
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的系统开发代码自动补全方法
abstract_zh:
在软件开发领域，仅能使用简单的加密系统开发代码数据，导致生成代码的准确率较低。为解决这一问题，本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的系统开发代码自动补全方法。首先，在加密系统开发代码数据方面，设计了一种基于椭圆曲线密码学的动态密钥协商方案，以及一种分层缓存调度机制，并采用双重认证机制以保障数据安全。随后，构建了代码补全模型，利用双通道特征编码器提取加密代码特征；通过动态上下文编码层建模历史依赖关系，结合强化学习决策层，采用PPO算法优化补全策略，并设计相应的奖励函数。最后，提出一种基于三元组对比学习与多粒度特征融合的补全框架，以功能模块作为锚点构建三元组数据，计算匹配概率与动态权重向量，融合多维度信息，实现代码的自动化补全。

实验结果表明：在数据处理方面，该方法能在30秒内自动生成与实际编写代码趋势高度一致的数据。从准确率与耗时角度分析，该方法在200毫秒内即可达到90%的准确率，仅需100至150毫秒即可将准确率从70%提升至85%。相较于已有文献方法，本设计具有良好的可扩展性、平台无关性以及完全自动化的集成能力。代码生成效率达到每秒**25行**，远超其他现有方法，能够精准高效地完成系统开发代码的自动补全。

title: Research on Transformer-based Large Language Model Generation Technology
authors: Zhuang Bai, Wenjia Jiang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Electrical and Electronic Engineering (AI3E)
abstract: This paper focuses on the generation technology of large language models (LLMs) based on the Transformer architecture. First, it systematically elaborates on the core principles of the Transformer, including the self-attention mechanism and the encoder-decoder structure, and provides the core formulas. Then, it analyzes the technical evolution of the generative pre-training (GPT) model based on the decoderonly architecture. This paper uses the speech generation model SpeechGEN as a frontier case study to analyze how it successfully extends the generation and context-learning capabilities of LLMs to continuous speech signals through a unified speech tokenizer and prompt mechanism. Finally, the paper concludes with a summary and outlook on the future development trends of LLM generation technology.
title_zh: 基于Transformer的大语言模型生成技术研究
abstract_zh: 本文聚焦于基于Transformer架构的大语言模型（LLM）生成技术。首先，系统阐述了Transformer的核心原理，包括自注意力机制和编码器-解码器结构，并给出了核心公式。随后，分析了基于仅解码器架构的生成式预训练（GPT）模型的技术演进过程。本文以前沿案例SpeechGEN语音生成模型为例，深入探讨其如何通过统一的语音分词器与提示机制，成功将大语言模型的生成能力与上下文学习能力拓展至连续语音信号领域。最后，文章对大语言模型生成技术的发展进行了总结，并展望了未来的发展趋势。

title: Leveraging Language Models for Automated Requirements to Design Transformation in MDA
authors: Abdykhalyk Arystan
publish: 2026 18th International Conference on Electronics, Computer, and Computation (ICECCO)
abstract: Model-Driven Architecture (MDA) promises traceable development but still depends on manual translation of natural-language requirements into UML. The research describes an easy-to-use method which converts requirements into UML diagrams for the small multilingual Almaty pilot project. The system employs three main components which include a restricted intermediate JSON schema generated by a big language model (LLM) and PlantUML conversion through deterministic methods and XMI export for tool verification and basic rule-based comparison. The system evaluates structural extraction quality for vital UML elements by using precision/recall/F1 metrics which measure against a reference standard and assesses engineering value through XMI import success rates and human postediting time requirements. The following terms appear in this document: Model-Driven Architecture (MDA) and Requirements Engineering and Large Language Models (LLMs) and UML class diagrams and Model transformation and Accessibility.
title_zh: 利用语言模型实现MDA中从需求到设计的自动化转换
abstract_zh: 模型驱动架构（MDA）承诺实现可追溯的开发过程，但仍依赖于将自然语言需求手动转换为UML。本研究描述了一种易于使用的方法，可将需求转化为UML图，应用于小型多语言阿斯塔纳试点项目。该系统包含三个主要组件：由大语言模型（LLM）生成的受限中间JSON模式、通过确定性方法进行的PlantUML转换，以及用于工具验证和基础规则比较的XMI导出。系统通过精确率、召回率和F1值等指标评估关键UML元素的结构提取质量，这些指标以参考标准为基准；同时，通过XMI导入成功率和人工后期编辑时间来评估其工程价值。本文档中出现的术语包括：模型驱动架构（MDA）、需求工程、大语言模型（LLMs）、UML类图、模型转换和可访问性。

title: HammerBlade in Silicon: A 12-nm 2048-Core RISC-V Manycore SoC With Ruche Networks
authors: Paul Gao, Dai Cheol Jung, Scott Davidson, Daniel Ruelas-Petrisko, Yuan-Mao Chueh, Max Ruttenberg, Kangli Li, Farzam Gilani, Dustin Richmond, Mark Oskin, Michael Bedford Taylor
publish: IEEE Transactions on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) Systems
abstract: This brief presents the 99 mm<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>, 12-nm FinFET, 2048-core HammerBlade (HB) RISC-V manycore system-on-chip (SoC) which includes the world’s first implementation of Ruche Networks, a wire-maximal network-on-chip (NoC) topology. Prior architecture research argues for HB’s physical and logical scalability, programmability, and high density; this brief shows a concrete realization in silicon. This brief demonstrates strong results running in silicon on 2048 cores over a diverse set of representative parallelized applications, and also a world record on CoreMark (CM) score. This brief further describes in detail the silicon implementation of Ruche Networks. Operating at 1.49 GHz at 0.8 V, the NoC delivers a peak aggregate bandwidth of 2572.6 Tb/s and a bisection bandwidth of 53.2 Tb/s. The design achieves an exceptionally high routing density of 4289 bit/mm. Finally, this brief demonstrates how a small team of Ph.D. students overcame large-chip backend computer-aided design (CAD) challenges using on-chip source-synchronous interconnect (OCSSI), a globally asynchronous locally synchronous (GALS) style top-level integration methodology, combined with a turnaround-time optimized hierarchical design flow.
title_zh: 硅基锤刃：一款12纳米2048核RISC-V多核SoC，采用Ruche网络架构
abstract_zh: 本简报介绍了99 mm²、12 nm FinFET工艺、2048核HammerBlade（HB）RISC-V多核片上系统（SoC），该系统包含世界上首个实现的Ruche网络——一种线长最大化的片上网络（NoC）拓扑结构。此前的架构研究已论证了HB在物理与逻辑可扩展性、可编程性及高密度方面的优势，而本简报则展示了其在硅片上的具体实现。该简报展示了在2048个核心上运行多种代表性并行应用时取得的优异性能表现，并创下CoreMark（CM）得分的世界纪录。此外，本文还详细描述了Ruche网络的硅片实现细节。该NoC在0.8 V电压下以1.49 GHz频率运行，峰值聚合带宽达2572.6 Tb/s，分割带宽为53.2 Tb/s。设计实现了高达4289 bit/mm的惊人路由密度。最后，本简报还展示了由一小支博士生团队如何通过采用片上源同步互连（OCSSI）、全局异步局部同步（GALS）风格的顶层集成方法，以及优化周转时间的分层设计流程，成功克服了大规模芯片后端计算机辅助设计（CAD）的挑战。

title: From CAD Data to Semantic Graphs: Integration and Derivation of Domain-Specific Knowledge within Classified Graphs
authors: Robin Taba, Joshua Falkenhain, Dr. Frank Köster
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: This paper presents a hybrid framework that integrates machine learning and ontological reasoning in graph-based representations of CAD assemblies to enable functional analysis. Building on the Core Product Model (CPM), we define multiple levels of information richness within our hybrid-data CAD assembly graphs, which fuse geometric and parametric data from STEP and CATIA sources into a unified semantic representation. By embedding CAD domain expertise into ontological rule sets and coupling them with machine learning models refined through ontology-guided calibration, our method elevates low-information assembly graphs to higher levels within a defined CPM hierarchy of semantic significance. The enriched graphs support the inference of implicit degrees of freedom and the automated propagation of motion by operationalizing ontological rules. Demonstrated on gearbox assemblies, the approach reconstructs complete kinematic chains from input to output. By uniting rule-based reasoning with machine-learned prediction, this work establishes a foundation for semantic, interpretable, and knowledge-driven CAD graph analysis.
title_zh: 从CAD数据到语义图：在分类图中集成与推导领域特定知识
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种混合框架，将机器学习与本体论推理相结合，应用于基于图的CAD装配体表示，以实现功能分析。在核心产品模型（CPM）的基础上，我们定义了混合数据CAD装配图中多个信息丰富度层次，将来自STEP和CATIA的几何与参数数据融合为统一的语义表示。通过将CAD领域知识嵌入本体规则集，并结合经过本体引导校准优化的机器学习模型，我们的方法能够将低信息量的装配图提升至预定义CPM层级中更高层次的语义重要性级别。增强后的图结构支持隐含自由度的推断以及运动的自动化传播，通过实现本体规则来完成这一过程。在齿轮箱装配体上的应用表明，该方法可从输入到输出重构完整的运动链。通过融合基于规则的推理与机器学习预测，本研究为语义化、可解释且知识驱动的CAD图分析奠定了基础。

title: Bio-Inspired Flower Robot for Emotional Human-Robot Interaction_supp1-3686643.mp4
authors: Hongqiang WANG
publish: N/A
abstract: Mental health problems are common worldwide, but the available support systems and healthcare services are insufficient and inadequate. Social robots offer a promising solution to achieve social interaction and emotional connection. Nature-inspired architectural robotics can seamlessly blend into human daily life by reshaping future living environments. In this work, inspired by natural flowers, we designed a flower robot with a realistic morphology that simulates the opening-closing, rhythmic movements, and stem-bending movement. Building on the morphological design, we integrated a flex sensor into the petals to enable touch-induced tactile feedback, mimicking the touch-induced plant-like seismonastic movement. Furthermore, we incorporated voice interaction powered by a local large language model (LLM) to achieve adaptive intent understanding and personalized semantic engagement, thereby enhancing interaction flexibility compared to the repetitive tasks and rigid protocols of traditional social robots. Finally, the human-robot interaction (HRI) experiment demonstrated that the flower robot significantly reduced participants' negative emotions and provided positive social engagement. This work developed a bio-inspired flower robot, offering a promising pathway to social interaction and soothing presence.
title_zh: 仿生花机器人用于情感化人机交互_补充1-3686643.mp4
abstract_zh: 全球范围内，心理健康问题普遍存在，但现有的支持系统和医疗保健服务却远远不足且难以满足需求。社交机器人为实现社会互动与情感连接提供了有前景的解决方案。受自然启发的建筑型机器人能够通过重塑未来的居住环境，无缝融入人类日常生活。在本研究中，我们受到自然花朵的启发，设计了一款具有真实形态的花形机器人，其能够模拟花朵的开合、节律性运动以及茎干弯曲等动作。基于这一形态设计，我们在花瓣中集成了柔性传感器，实现了触觉触发的触感反馈，模仿了植物特有的感震运动特性。此外，我们还引入了由本地大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的语音交互功能，实现了对用户意图的自适应理解与个性化的语义互动，从而显著提升了交互灵活性，突破了传统社交机器人重复任务和僵化协议的局限。最后，人机交互（HRI）实验表明，该花形机器人显著降低了参与者的负面情绪，并带来了积极的社会互动体验。本研究开发出一种仿生花形机器人，为促进社会互动与提供舒缓陪伴开辟了极具前景的新路径。

title: Toward Automated Circuit Schematic Design for Power Electronics: A Hierarchical Agent for Component Prediction
authors: Bowen Su, Huan Chen, Jiahua Ying, Ran Ou, Zengyang Liu, Kai Sun
publish: IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics
abstract: Power electronic equipment is a cornerstone of renewable energy generation systems. However, the current design process of power electronics remains highly dependent on engineers’ expertise, making it labor-intensive and unable to meet the rapidly growing application demands. This article aims to automate one of the most time-consuming stages in power electronics design—the circuit schematic design process. By representing schematic components as nodes, the circuit design task is reformulated as a graph node prediction problem. To address the challenges of over-smoothing caused by the uneven distribution of circuit components and the inability of large language models (LLMs) to directly process graph-structured schematic data, we propose a hierarchical agent for power electronic schematic design. This agent integrates the graph processing capabilities of graph learning models with the powerful inference abilities of LLMs. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated through a buck converter case study and extensive comparisons between the trained graph learning module and baseline models, including comprehensive ablation studies. Experimental results demonstrate an improvement of up to 28.5% in TOP-5 accuracy over the baseline. This work represents a preliminary step toward fully automated power electronics design and lays the foundation for future research and development in this field.
title_zh: 面向电力电子自动电路图设计：一种用于元器件预测的分层智能体
abstract_zh: 电力电子设备是可再生能源发电系统的核心组成部分。然而，当前电力电子设计过程仍高度依赖工程师的专业经验，导致设计工作繁重，难以满足日益增长的应用需求。本文旨在自动化电力电子设计中最为耗时的环节——电路原理图设计过程。通过将电路元件表示为图中的节点，电路设计任务被重新建模为一个图节点预测问题。针对电路元件分布不均所引发的过平滑问题，以及大语言模型（LLMs）无法直接处理图结构原理图数据的挑战，本文提出了一种分层代理架构，用于电力电子原理图设计。该代理融合了图学习模型在图数据处理方面的优势与大语言模型强大的推理能力。通过降压变换器案例研究，以及对训练后的图学习模块与基线模型进行广泛对比，包括全面的消融实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。实验结果表明，相较于基线模型，TOP-5准确率最高提升了28.5%。本工作为实现完全自动化的电力电子设计迈出了初步一步，并为该领域的未来研究与发展奠定了基础。

title: A Geometric Abstention Mechanism for Language Models
authors: C. M. Wyss
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Due to the nature of their architecture, Large Language Models (LLMs) typically produce responses even when no coherent answer exists. In this paper, we introduce a principled, geometric mechanism that enables LLMs to abstain in such circumstances. Our approach is grounded in the notion of a Continuous State Machine (CSM), which is a glass-box model of LLM inference dynamics. In particular, a CSM can be instantiated from an ontology so that the geometry of its latent semantic space reflects that ontology. This means, among other things, that input probes trace trajectories through semantic space until either converging to a concept attractor (in-domain) or remaining isolated in null space (out-of-domain), enabling the system to distinguish realizable from non-realizable input.
title_zh: 语言模型的几何回避机制
abstract_zh: 由于其架构特性，大型语言模型（LLMs）通常会在没有合理答案的情况下仍生成回应。本文提出了一种基于几何原理的系统性机制，使LLM能够在此类情况下选择不作答。我们的方法建立在“连续状态机”（Continuous State Machine, CSM）的概念之上，这是一种可解释的LLM推理动态模型。具体而言，CSM可以从本体论（ontology）中构建，使其潜在语义空间的几何结构反映该本体论的结构。这意味着，输入探针在语义空间中会沿着特定轨迹移动，最终要么收敛至某个概念吸引子（属于领域内），要么停留在空域中保持孤立（属于领域外）。这一特性使得系统能够有效区分可实现与不可实现的输入。

title: The Versatility of Large Language Models in Traffic and Mobility Simulations
authors: Maren Schnieder, Gary B. Glesener
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: The transformative potential of large language models (LLMs) in urban mobility planning and traffic simulations is undeniable. This position paper seeks to cultivate curiosity in the application of LLMs by underscoring their versatility and potential to support various facets of traffic simulations. They enable natural-language-based interaction with software. LLMs have been harnessed to generate or refine simulation models, as well as to write the code or files necessary to create the simulations or models. They have proven effective in predicting travel choices and forecasting passenger demand for both typical and rare events. Furthermore, LLMs can enhance agent-based simulations by creating realistic daily activity patterns, enabling agents to reason, and allowing them to dynamically adapt to their environment, thus closely emulating human behavior. Notably, LLMs have successfully replicated human decision-making processes in areas such as mode choice experiments and economic decision-making. Given this breadth of proven utility—from intuitive user interfaces, model development and demand forecasting to the accurate replication of human decision-making in areas like agent-based modeling, mode choice and economics—this paper argues that adopting LLMs is critical to transform current mobility planning workflows.
title_zh: 大型语言模型在交通与出行模拟中的多功能性
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在城市交通规划与交通仿真中的变革潜力毋庸置疑。本文旨在激发人们对LLMs应用的兴趣，强调其多功能性以及在交通仿真各个方面的潜在支持作用。LLMs能够实现基于自然语言的软件交互，使用户无需掌握复杂编程技能即可与系统进行沟通。它们已被用于生成或优化仿真模型，甚至编写创建仿真或模型所需的代码和文件。在预测出行选择以及常规与罕见事件下的乘客需求方面，LLMs已展现出显著成效。此外，LLMs还能通过构建逼真的日常活动模式，增强基于代理的仿真能力，使代理具备推理能力，并能动态适应环境变化，从而更真实地模拟人类行为。尤为突出的是，LLMs已在出行方式选择实验和经济决策等领域的决策过程模拟中成功复现了人类的决策机制。鉴于其在直观用户界面、模型开发、需求预测，以及在基于代理建模、出行方式选择和经济学等领域对人类决策行为的精准再现等方面的广泛实证价值，本文主张：采纳大型语言模型对于革新当前的交通规划工作流程至关重要。

title: From APIs to Semantic Agents: Evolving Enterprise Platforms through Knowledge-Driven AI
authors: Sureshkumar Karuppuchamy
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Modern enterprise systems expose functionality through APIs, yet these interfaces remain static and unaware of business context. This paper introduces a knowledge-driven semantic agent architecture that transforms traditional APIs into intelligent, goal-oriented services by combining large language models (LLMs) with symbolic reasoning and enterprise knowledge. The framework defines a semantic contract for each API (linking all inputs and outputs to an ontology) and embeds a neuro-symbolic control loop that interprets user intent, applies domain knowledge and business rules, and dynamically plans actions. A prototype was developed in realistic e-commerce scenarios (free-form product listing and adaptive order handling) to evaluate feasibility. Methodologically, two agent-augmented API services were evaluated on 40 test cases (20 per scenario) against baseline implementations, measuring task success, policy compliance, and latency. The semantic agents consistently achieved higher success rates ($\sim 90 \%$ task completion) with no observed policy violations, while introducing only a modest latency overhead of a few hundred milliseconds-well within acceptable ranges for enterprise workflows. These results demonstrate that knowledge-driven agents can significantly improve automation, adaptability, and explainability in enterprise platforms. The paper details the system architecture, implementation, and quantitative evaluation, and discusses how semantic contracts and neuro-symbolic reasoning enable “APIs that think” in an AI-powered enterprise.
title_zh: 从API到语义代理：通过知识驱动的人工智能演进企业平台
abstract_zh: 现代企业系统通过API暴露功能，但这些接口仍保持静态且缺乏业务上下文感知。本文提出一种基于知识的语义智能体架构，通过将大型语言模型（LLMs）与符号推理及企业知识相结合，将传统API转化为具有目标导向性的智能服务。该框架为每个API定义了语义契约（将所有输入输出与本体相链接），并嵌入了一个神经符号控制循环，能够解析用户意图、应用领域知识和业务规则，并动态规划行动方案。研究在真实的电子商务场景中开发了原型系统，涵盖自由格式的商品发布和自适应订单处理两项任务，以评估其可行性。方法上，针对每种场景选取20个测试用例（共40个），对两种增强型智能体API服务与基线实现进行对比评估，衡量任务成功率、策略合规性以及延迟表现。结果表明，语义智能体在所有测试中均实现了约90%的任务完成率，未出现任何策略违规情况，同时仅引入数百毫秒的轻微延迟，完全处于企业工作流可接受范围内。这些成果证明，基于知识的智能体能够显著提升企业平台在自动化、适应性和可解释性方面的能力。本文详细阐述了系统架构、实现方式与量化评估结果，并探讨了语义契约与神经符号推理如何使“会思考的API”成为现实，推动AI驱动的企业系统迈向智能化新阶段。

title: Adapting Multilingual Models to Code-Mixed Tasks via Model Merging
authors: Prashant Kodali, Vaishnavi Shivkumar, Swarang Joshi, Monojit Choudhury, Ponnurangam Kumaraguru, Manish Shrivastava
publish: Proceedings of the 13th ACM IKDD International Conference on Data Science
abstract: None
title_zh: 通过模型合并将多语言模型适配到代码混用任务
abstract_zh: None

title: Context Definition for Large Language Model Validation and Enhancement
authors: Brian Feng, David Alfred Ostrowski
publish: 2026 International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated substantial promise across the enterprise ranging from software development to task automation. Most notably among the challenges specifically in support of agentic-based implementations are management of their tendency to present fabricated information as factually accurate data. This necessitates the implementation of methodologies to support improvement in LLM accuracy followed by a means of selfcorrection via model enhancement. In support of model validation and mitigation of factually incorrect data, a framework is identified to enhance the performance of LLMs allowing for enhanced efficiency and credibility. This framework emphasizes a consensus-based means of model validation by comparing output from multiple competing models. In addition, the framework supports a means of enhancement via a feedback mechanism leveraging a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) methodology allowing for improved context in subsequent iterations. Preliminary results show promise with mitigation of hallucinations in the majority of test cases.
title_zh: 大型语言模型验证与增强的上下文定义
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在企业应用中展现出巨大潜力，涵盖软件开发到任务自动化等多个领域。其中，针对基于智能体（agentic）实现的挑战尤为突出，即如何管理模型倾向于将虚构信息当作事实数据呈现的问题。这要求实施一系列方法以提升LLM的准确性，并通过模型优化实现自我修正。为支持模型验证并减少事实性错误数据的产生，本文提出一个框架，旨在提升LLM的性能，从而增强其效率与可信度。该框架强调基于共识的模型验证机制，通过比较多个竞争性模型的输出结果来实现。此外，该框架还引入一种基于反馈机制的增强方法，利用检索增强生成（RAG）技术，使后续迭代能够获得更丰富的上下文信息。初步实验结果表明，该方法在多数测试案例中有效缓解了幻觉现象。

title: Command Pattern Recognition in Linux-Based Cyber Incidents Using Large Language Models for Intelligent Honeypot Systems
authors: Raiymbek Magazov, Fatima Uralova, Gulnur Aksholak, Kuanysh Abeshev
publish: 2026 18th International Conference on Electronics, Computer, and Computation (ICECCO)
abstract: Linux servers exposed via Secure Shell (SSH) remain a major target in command-driven cyber intrusions, yet conventional low- and medium-interaction honeypots often provide unrealistic responses and limited session state, causing attackers to terminate sessions before later attack stages can be observed. This paper proposes an intelligent SSH honeypot based on large language models that maintains context-aware terminal interaction while simultaneously supporting semantic analysis of attacker command streams. The system combines an SSH front-end, an LLM processing layer, centralized logging, and an embedding-based analytics pipeline for clustering commands and mapping them to attack stages such as reconnaissance, exploitation, and persistence. The language model is fine-tuned for Linux command understanding and realistic response generation, and the proposed method is evaluated against token-based and ngram baselines. Results from a six-month distributed deployment with approximately four million interaction events show that the LLM-enhanced approach improves command recognition performance to an F1-score of 0.90 and increases attacker engagement by extending session depth and duration. The findings indicate that LLM-assisted honeypots can provide more realistic deception and richer threatintelligence telemetry from Linux-based cyber incidents.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的智能蜜罐系统中Linux网络攻击事件的命令模式识别
abstract_zh: 通过安全外壳协议（SSH）暴露的Linux服务器仍是命令驱动型网络入侵的主要目标，然而传统的低交互和中等交互蜜罐往往提供不切实际的响应并缺乏完整的会话状态，导致攻击者在进入后续攻击阶段前就终止会话。本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能SSH蜜罐，能够在保持上下文感知终端交互的同时，对攻击者命令流进行语义分析。该系统由SSH前端、LLM处理层、集中式日志记录以及基于嵌入向量的分析流水线组成，可对命令进行聚类，并将其映射到侦察、利用和持久化等攻击阶段。语言模型经过微调，以增强对Linux命令的理解能力并生成更真实的响应。所提出的方案与基于标记（token）和n-gram的基线方法进行了对比评估。在为期六个月的分布式部署中，共处理约四百万次交互事件，结果表明，采用LLM增强的方法将命令识别的F1分数提升至0.90，并显著延长了会话深度与持续时间，提高了攻击者的参与度。研究结果表明，基于LLM的蜜罐能够提供更逼真的欺骗效果，并从基于Linux的网络攻击事件中获取更丰富的威胁情报数据。
